title: Property Consultant - Nexus Select Trust - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Nexus Select Trust - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
